tables.name: netflix_titles
tables.mExpression:
let
    NetflixSrc = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:/Users/SiddhiVermaMAQSoftwa/OneDrive - MAQ Software/Desktop/Deterministic/Deterministic-Agentic/Data/Netflix RLS/netflix_titles.csv"), [Delimiter=",", Columns=12, Encoding=65001, QuoteStyle=QuoteStyle.Csv]),
    NetflixHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(NetflixSrc, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    Netflix = Table.TransformColumnTypes(NetflixHeaders, {{"show_id", Int64.Type}, {"type", type text}, {"title", type text}, {"director", type text}, {"cast", type text}, {"country", type text}, {"date_added", type text}, {"release_year", Int64.Type}, {"rating", type text}, {"duration", type text}, {"listed_in", type text}, {"description", type text}}, "en-US"),
    AccessSrc = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:/Users/SiddhiVermaMAQSoftwa/OneDrive - MAQ Software/Desktop/Deterministic/Deterministic-Agentic/Data/Netflix RLS/User_Access.csv"), [Delimiter=",", Columns=2, Encoding=65001, QuoteStyle=QuoteStyle.Csv]),
    AccessHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(AccessSrc, [PromoteAllScalars=true]),
    Access = Table.TransformColumnTypes(AccessHeaders, {{"Username", type text}, {"Country", type text}}, "en-US"),
    WithAccess = Table.AddColumn(Netflix, "AccessMatches", (n) => Table.SelectRows(Access, each Text.Contains(Text.Lower(if n[country] = null then "" else n[country]), Text.Lower([Country])))),
    Expanded = Table.ExpandTableColumn(WithAccess, "AccessMatches", {"Username"}, {"Username"}),
    WithYear = Table.AddColumn(Expanded, "Year Added", each try Number.FromText(Text.End(Text.Trim([date_added]), 4)) otherwise null, Int64.Type)
in
    WithYear

measures.name: Movies Count
measures.description: Distinct titles where type is Movie.

measures.name: TV Shows Count
measures.description: Distinct titles where type is TV Show.

measures.name: Genre Rank
measures.description: Dense rank of genres (listed_in) by Title Count for Top N genre filtering.

visualDecisions.reason: Tableau Multipolygon map shaded by distinct title count -> Power BI filled choropleth with light->red saturation.
rating on columns, distinct show_id count on rows -> vertical column chart of titles per rating.
listed_in on rows, distinct show_id count -> horizontal bar chart sorted by title count (top genres first).
Tableau two-circle Movie/TV split by share -> Power BI donut of Title Count by type with brand colors.

visualDecisions.worksheet: Total Movies and TV Shows by Years
visualDecisions.reason: Area of distinct titles added per year, stacked by Movie/TV type.
